---
title: "Whitepapers"
subtitle: "Externally releasable deep-dives on UIAO governance topics"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Federal CIO/CISO · assessors · research audience"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

# Whitepapers {.unnumbered}

Long-form synthesis across multiple canon anchors. Whitepapers are the
most heavyweight customer artifact: they cite the Executive Briefs and
Architecture Series rather than re-deriving foundational material. Every
whitepaper is ATO-package-ready and exportable as PDF/DOCX/EPUB.

## Status conventions

Each entry in the table below carries a status badge derived from the
target document's frontmatter, surfaced here so readers know what they
are looking at before opening it:

- **Active** — content describes a program or capability in routine
  operational use against the current canon; the prose has been
  validated against at least one reference deployment.
- **Draft** — content is canonical (governed by the canon-change
  protocol) but the program or capability described is still being
  designed, piloted, or validated. Safe to reference; subject to
  refinement.
- **Aspirational** — the page additionally carries `aspirational: true`
  in frontmatter; a richer callout appears at the top of the page when
  it is opened. Adoption guidance applies as in the page banner.

Adoption state for the substrate as a whole is tracked on the
[Substrate Status](../../docs/substrate-status.qmd) page.

## Pages in this section

| Slug | Topic | Status | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|---|
| `uiao-governance-os-whitepaper` | The UIAO Governance OS | Draft | substrate manifest + unified architecture |
| `zero-trust-governance-whitepaper` | Zero-trust governance pattern | Draft | ADR-008 + ZT overview brief |
| `modernization-governance-whitepaper` | Governance through modernization | Draft | Program Vision + Modernization Timeline |
| `scubagear-integration-whitepaper` | SCuBAGear substrate integration | Draft | `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml#scubagear` |
| `federal-ssot-alignment` | Federal SSOT mandate alignment over the identity layer | Draft | `UIAO_007` + directory-migration README + drift standard |
